title: Purchase Manager
description:
• Manage end-to-end procurement processes, including sourcing, evaluation, contracting and vendor management.
  • Liaisoning with the China office for rate negotiation, bidding, invoicing.
  • Identifying potential new suppliers, conducting due diligence, and managing supplier onboarding processes.
  • Develop and maintain relationships with key suppliers to foster collaboration and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Conduct regular analysis of procurement data to identify trends, opportunities for cost reduction, and process improvements.
  • Conducting supplier evaluations, audits, and assessments to ensure compliance with quality, delivery, and cost targets.
  • Support initiatives and efforts to manage supplier relationships including administrative and operational activities and issues.
  • Recommend continuous quality improvement practices and implement industry best practice, leverage data to drive best practice across the account.
  • Conducting market analysis and benchmarking studies to ensure competitive pricing and value for money.
  • Maintain vendor contracts, review them, negotiate the rates , etc.
  • Coordinate and manage payments to vendors, adhering to financial protocols and ensuring timely disbursement.
  • Oversee the logistics for loading and unloading materials, ensuring all goods meet quality standards and are processed on time.


Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in supply chain/business administration or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of 4 years of experience in procurement. Experience in furniture procurement, Real Estate and hospitality industry are advantageous.
  • Strong negotiation skills and ability to drive cost savings initiatives.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities simultaneously.
  • Be well versed in creating and using Excel spreadsheets with complex formula.
  • Proven record of working independently, a self-starter.
  • High levels of flexibility and adaptability.
  • Strong team playing skills.
  • Act with utmost integrity.
  • Able to read and communicate in Mandarin to liaise with Mandarin-speaking suppliers

postedCompany.description:
Greenfield Advisory advises institutional and accredited investors in managing investments. We endeavour to explore opportunities in emerging markets such as South East Asia, by way of passive investments such as fixed income and hedge funds which invest in both listed and unlisted companies.

We are a client-centric company that aims to become a leader by providing a trusted and transparent investment platform, empowering our clients to choose their level of involvement in the overall investment process.

Our mission is to generate value for our clients. Your interests are our top priority and we consider you a long-term partner. With us you can count on competent and qualified service from a single source. We offer first-rate asset management solutions and services, structured products as well as services in the areas of External Asset Management.
postedCompany.name: GREENFIELD ADVISORY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
